authentication.description: All requests require accessTokenKey and accessTokenSecret headers.

endpoints.name: List Events
endpoints.description: List all events with optional date/type filters. Returns paginated event metadata.

endpoints.name: Client Attendees
endpoints.description: List attendees across all events. Returns engagement metrics and session details. Paginated.

endpoints.name: Attendee by Email
endpoints.description: Get most recent attendance for an email. Returns engagement score and viewing time.

endpoints.name: Attendee All Events
endpoints.description: Get attendance across all events for an email. Paginated.

endpoints.name: Client Registrants
endpoints.description: List registrants across all events. Paginated.

endpoints.name: Registrant by Email
endpoints.description: Get registration for an email. Optionally filter by event or partner ref.

endpoints.name: Registrant All Events
endpoints.description: Get all registrations across events for an email. Supports sub-account filtering.

endpoints.name: Client Survey Library
endpoints.description: Get reusable survey question library. Returns templates with questions and answer options.

endpoints.name: Engaged Accounts
endpoints.description: Top engaged accounts from last 90 days (max 100). Useful for ABM targeting.

endpoints.name: Client Leads
endpoints.description: List leads across all events. Returns lead scores and engagement levels. Paginated.

endpoints.name: Prospect Engagement Profile
endpoints.description: Get PEP score and engagement history for an email across all touchpoints.

endpoints.name: Client Presenters
endpoints.description: List all presenters across the client account.

endpoints.name: Sub-Clients
endpoints.description: List sub-client accounts under this client.

endpoints.name: Real-time User Questions
endpoints.description: Questions submitted in last 5 minutes across live events. Real-time Q&A monitoring.

endpoints.name: Users
endpoints.description: List platform users for the client account. Returns names, emails, roles.

endpoints.name: Event Attendees
endpoints.description: List attendees for a specific event with engagement data. Paginated.

endpoints.name: Attendee Viewing Sessions
endpoints.description: Get viewing session data for an event. Shows live vs on-demand session breakdowns.

endpoints.name: Call to Action
endpoints.description: Get CTA click activity for an event. Shows which CTAs were clicked and by whom.

endpoints.name: Certifications
endpoints.description: Get certification completions for an event.

endpoints.name: Engagement Hub Content Activity
endpoints.description: Get content interaction data for an Engagement Hub event.

endpoints.name: Email Calendar Reminder
endpoints.description: Get calendar reminder configuration for an event.

endpoints.name: Email Notification Details
endpoints.description: Get email notification configurations for an event. Returns all email templates.

endpoints.name: Email Statistics
endpoints.description: Get email send/open/click statistics for an event.

endpoints.name: Group Chat Activity
endpoints.description: Get group chat messages and activity for an event.

endpoints.name: Event Metadata and Usage
endpoints.description: Get full event details including title, dates, type, and aggregate engagement stats.

endpoints.name: Polls
endpoints.description: Get poll questions and responses for an event.

endpoints.name: Presentation Manager Chat Logs
endpoints.description: Get presenter-to-presenter chat logs from an event.

endpoints.name: Event Presenters
endpoints.description: Get presenters assigned to a specific event.

endpoints.name: Event Registrants
endpoints.description: List registrants for a specific event. Paginated. Can filter for no-shows.

endpoints.name: Resources Viewed
endpoints.description: Get resource download/view activity for an event.

endpoints.name: Surveys
endpoints.description: Get survey questions and responses for an event.

endpoints.name: REST Registration
endpoints.description: Register a person for an event. Requires email, firstname, lastname. Supports custom fields.

endpoints.name: Update Registrant (Event Level)
endpoints.description: Update registrant fields at event level.

endpoints.name: Update Registrant (Client Level)
endpoints.description: Update registrant fields across all events at client level.

endpoints.name: Forget Registrant
endpoints.description: GDPR: Nullify all PII for registrant(s). Email becomes {id}-deleted, names become 'deleted'.

endpoints.name: Forget All (Event Level)
endpoints.description: GDPR: Nullify all PII for all registrants in an event.

endpoints.name: Forget All (Workspace Level)
endpoints.description: GDPR: Nullify all PII for all registrants across the entire workspace.

endpoints.name: Remove Registration
endpoints.description: Remove a registrant from an event by email.

endpoints.name: Copy a Webinar
endpoints.description: Copy an existing webinar to create a new event with the same settings.

endpoints.name: Create a Webinar
endpoints.description: Create a new webinar with full configuration options.

endpoints.name: Create Related Content
endpoints.description: Upload related content (file or URL) for an event.

endpoints.name: Create Speaker Bio
endpoints.description: Create a speaker bio with optional image for an event.

endpoints.name: Create Survey Questions
endpoints.description: Create survey questions for an event.

endpoints.name: Delete Speaker Bio
endpoints.description: Delete all speaker bios for an event.

endpoints.name: Delete VTT Files
endpoints.description: Delete VTT caption files for an event.

endpoints.name: Delete Webinar
endpoints.description: Delete a webinar entirely.

endpoints.name: Edit a Webinar
endpoints.description: Edit a webinar (full replacement). All required fields must be provided.
endpoints.notes: Full PUT — omitted optional fields reset to defaults.

endpoints.name: Update a Webinar
endpoints.description: Update specific webinar fields (partial update). Only provided fields change.
endpoints.notes: Partial PUT — only send fields to change.

endpoints.name: Media Manager Upload Document
endpoints.description: Upload a document to Media Manager.

endpoints.name: Media Manager Upload Video
endpoints.description: Upload a video to Media Manager.

endpoints.name: Slide Listing
endpoints.description: Get the slide listing for an event.

endpoints.name: Update Email Calendar Reminder
endpoints.description: Update calendar reminder settings for an event.

endpoints.name: Update Email Notification
endpoints.description: Update an email notification template for an event.

endpoints.name: Upload Slides
endpoints.description: Upload PowerPoint slides for an event.

endpoints.name: Update Text With Banner Widget
endpoints.description: Update the text-with-banner widget for an event.

endpoints.name: Engagement Hub Content Listing
endpoints.description: Get content listing for an Engagement Hub.

parameters.name: gatewayId
parameters.description: Path parameter: Engagement Hub gateway ID

endpoints.name: Media Manager Derivative Content
endpoints.description: List Media Manager derivative content items. Paginated.

endpoints.name: Media Manager Content Detail
endpoints.description: Get a single Media Manager derivative content item.

endpoints.name: Custom Account Tags
endpoints.description: Get custom account tags configured for the client.

endpoints.name: Account Managers
endpoints.description: Get account manager contacts for the client.

endpoints.name: Event Types
endpoints.description: Get available event types (webcast, simulive, etc.).

endpoints.name: Language Codes
endpoints.description: Get available language codes for event configuration.

endpoints.name: Registration Fields
endpoints.description: Get registration form fields configured for an event.

endpoints.name: Replacement Tokens
endpoints.description: Get available replacement tokens for email templates.

endpoints.name: Sales Rep Contacts
endpoints.description: Get sales rep contacts for the client.

endpoints.name: Signal Contacts
endpoints.description: Get signal contacts for the client.

endpoints.name: Technical Rep Contacts
endpoints.description: Get technical rep contacts for the client.

endpoints.name: Timezones
endpoints.description: Get available timezone codes for event scheduling.

endpoints.name: Event Managers
endpoints.description: Get event manager contacts for the client.

endpoints.name: Event Profiles
endpoints.description: Get event profile templates for the client.

endpoints.name: Users
endpoints.description: List platform users for the client. Same endpoint as Client Analytics > Users.
